prompt: Our analytics dashboard is getting slow — some of the charts take 8-10 seconds to load on the main overview page. The data comes from ClickHouse via a GraphQL API. We think the problem is either in the query layer or in how the frontend renders large datasets. PM wants it under 2 seconds. We have about 50k daily active users. The dashboard code is in `apps/dashboard/` and the API is in `services/analytics-api/`.

assertions.text: requirements.draft.md file was created with all required sections
readiness-review.md file was created with a verdict and all 8 criteria scored
Task correctly classified as bug or performance issue (not feature/refactor)
Goal clearly states the performance target: page load under 2 seconds
Knowns mention ClickHouse, GraphQL API, specific file paths (apps/dashboard/, services/analytics-api/), 50k DAU
Unknowns include root cause uncertainty (query layer vs frontend rendering)
Verdict is reasonable for the level of detail provided (READY with flagged unknowns, or NEEDS_CLARIFICATION with specific targeted questions about which charts are slow)
